spec.description: Event-Driven Ordering System — Consumer Lag, Error Rates, Throughput

spec.title: Consumer Lag per Topic
spec.description: Kafka consumer lag per topic and consumer group

spec.title: Dead Letter Topic (DLT) Send Rate
spec.description: Total number of messages that have been routed to DLT (Dead Letter Topic)

spec.title: REST Latency — order-service (p50 / p99)
spec.description: HTTP request p99 latency for order endpoints

spec.title: JVM Heap Usage per Service
spec.description: JVM heap used across all three services

spec.title: Max Lag — order-service
spec.description: Max consumer lag across all partitions per service

spec.title: Max Lag — payment-service
spec.description: Max consumer lag across all partitions per service

spec.title: Max Lag — inventory-service
spec.description: Max consumer lag across all partitions per service

spec.title: Consumer Throughput — Records Consumed/s
spec.description: Messages consumed per second per topic across all services

spec.title: Producer Throughput — Records Sent/s
spec.description: Messages produced per second per topic

spec.title: HTTP Request Rate — order-service
spec.description: HTTP request rate to order-service REST endpoints

spec.title: Kafka Listener Error Rate
spec.description: Rate of Kafka consumer errors per service (exceptions thrown in @KafkaListener)

spec.title: HTTP Error Rate — order-service (4xx / 5xx)
spec.description: Rate of HTTP 5xx errors on order-service REST API
